Operation 'getQueueManager' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about required inputs (qmgrName parameter) and what specific details are returned. Enhanced description specifies the required parameter and provides examples of returned information for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific queue manager
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific queue manager identified by qmgrName. Returns queue manager configuration, status, and operational metrics. Requires the queue manager name as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about required inputs (qmgrName parameter) and what specific details are returned. Enhanced description specifies the required parameter and provides examples of returned information for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'listQueues' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is incomplete regarding available query parameters (filtering, pagination) and what queue properties are included in the response. Enhanced description clarifies parameter usage and response content for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns a list of queues for a specific queue manager
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all queues configured on the specified queue manager. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters. Returns queue names, types, and basic properties for each queue.
data.reasoning: Description is incomplete regarding available query parameters (filtering, pagination) and what queue properties are included in the response. Enhanced description clarifies parameter usage and response content for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createQueue' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks details about required request body fields, what is returned, and side effects (queue availability). Enhanced description specifies input requirements from QueueCreateRequest schema, return value, and operational side effects for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Creates a new queue on the specified queue manager
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new queue on the specified queue manager using the provided QueueCreateRequest. Requires queue name, type, and optional configuration properties. Returns the created queue object with assigned properties. The queue becomes immediately available for messaging after creation.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about required request body fields, what is returned, and side effects (queue availability). Enhanced description specifies input requirements from QueueCreateRequest schema, return value, and operational side effects for improved AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getQueue' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about required path parameters (qmgrName, queueName) and what specific queue details are returned. Enhanced description specifies required parameters and provides examples of returned information for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific queue
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific queue identified by queueName on the specified queue manager. Returns queue configuration, current depth, message properties, and operational status.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about required path parameters (qmgrName, queueName) and what specific queue details are returned. Enhanced description specifies required parameters and provides examples of returned information for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'updateQueue' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks details about what properties can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, what is returned, and when changes take effect. Enhanced description clarifies input expectations, partial update support, return value, and operational side effects for improved AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Updates properties of an existing queue
data.description_suggestion: Updates properties of an existing queue using the QueueUpdateRequest. Supports partial updates - only provided fields in the request will be modified. Returns the updated queue object. Changes take effect immediately without requiring queue manager restart.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about what properties can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, what is returned, and when changes take effect. Enhanced description clarifies input expectations, partial update support, return value, and operational side effects for improved AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteQueue' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks important preconditions (queue must be empty), required parameters, and critical side effects (permanent deletion, impact on subscriptions). Enhanced description specifies prerequisites, required parameters, and side effects to help AI agents understand constraints and consequences of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Deletes a queue from the queue manager
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a queue from the specified queue manager. The queue must be empty before deletion. Requires qmgrName and queueName path parameters. Deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. Any subscriptions or references to this queue will be invalidated.
data.reasoning: Description lacks important preconditions (queue must be empty), required parameters, and critical side effects (permanent deletion, impact on subscriptions). Enhanced description specifies prerequisites, required parameters, and side effects to help AI agents understand constraints and consequences of this destructive operation.

message: Operation 'listChannels' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what channel information is returned, parameter requirements, and response structure. Added specificity about response schema, parameter requirements, and filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns a list of channels for a specific queue manager
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all channels for a queue manager
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all channels configured on the specified queue manager. Requires the queue manager name as a path parameter. Returns a ChannelListResponse containing an array of Channel objects with properties including name, type, and status. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what channel information is returned, parameter requirements, and response structure. Added specificity about response schema, parameter requirements, and filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'listSubscriptions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about subscription properties, parameter requirements, and use cases. Added specificity about response structure, parameter requirements, and domain context about topic-based messaging for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns a list of subscriptions for a specific queue manager
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all subscriptions for a queue manager
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all subscriptions configured on the specified queue manager. Requires the queue manager name as a path parameter. Returns a SubscriptionListResponse containing an array of Subscription objects with properties including name, topic, and destination queue. Useful for discovering topic-based messaging subscriptions.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about subscription properties, parameter requirements, and use cases. Added specificity about response structure, parameter requirements, and domain context about topic-based messaging for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'browseMessages' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain parameter requirements, response structure, filtering capabilities, and use cases. Added details about non-destructive nature, response schema, and pagination support for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Browses messages on the specified queue without removing them
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves and displays messages from the specified queue without removing them (non-destructive read). Requires queue manager name and queue name as path parameters. Returns a MessageListResponse containing an array of Message objects with full message content and metadata. Supports filtering by message properties and pagination through query parameters. Useful for inspecting queue contents without consuming messages.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain parameter requirements, response structure, filtering capabilities, and use cases. Added details about non-destructive nature, response schema, and pagination support for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'consumeMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to clarify parameter requirements, response structure, and importantly, the side effect of permanent message removal. Added explicit state change information and filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding of consequences.

data.current_summary: Consume a message from a queue
data.current_description: Destructively gets (consumes) a message from the specified queue
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves and removes a message from the specified queue (destructive read). Requires queue manager name and queue name as path parameters. Returns a Message object containing the message content and metadata. The message is permanently removed from the queue after retrieval. Supports filtering by message properties through query parameters. This operation modifies queue state by removing the message.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to clarify parameter requirements, response structure, and importantly, the side effect of permanent message removal. Added explicit state change information and filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding of consequences.

message: Operation 'login' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain input requirements (LoginRequest schema), token usage instructions, token lifecycle, and authentication requirements for other operations. Added specificity about how to use the returned token and its validity period for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Authenticates a user and returns a LTPA token for subsequent API calls
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user with provided credentials and returns an LTPA token for use in subsequent API requests. Accepts a LoginRequest containing username and password. Returns an authentication token that should be included in the 'Authorization' header or as a cookie for authenticated operations. The token remains valid until explicitly invalidated via the logout endpoint. Required for accessing protected API resources.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain input requirements (LoginRequest schema), token usage instructions, token lifecycle, and authentication requirements for other operations. Added specificity about how to use the returned token and its validity period for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'logout' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain authentication requirements, what happens after logout, response structure, and security context. Added details about token invalidation, authentication requirements, and security implications for better AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Invalidates the current LTPA token
data.description_suggestion: Invalidates the current LTPA authentication token, terminating the user's session. Requires an active LTPA token in the request (via Authorization header or cookie). After successful logout, the token cannot be used for subsequent API calls. Returns a success response with no body. This operation should be called when the user session is no longer needed to ensure security.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain authentication requirements, what happens after logout, response structure, and security context. Added details about token invalidation, authentication requirements, and security implications for better AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific queue manager
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific queue manager identified by qmgrName. Returns queue manager configuration, status, and operational metrics. Requires the queue manager name as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about required inputs (qmgrName parameter) and what specific details are returned. Enhanced description specifies the required parameter and provides examples of returned information for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns a list of queues for a specific queue manager

data.reasoning: Description is incomplete regarding available query parameters (filtering, pagination) and what queue properties are included in the response. Enhanced description clarifies parameter usage and response content for better AI agent decision-making.

Enhanced description specifies input requirements from QueueCreateRequest schema, return value, and operational side effects for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Creates a new queue on the specified queue manager
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new queue on the specified queue manager using the provided QueueCreateRequest. Requires queue name, type, and optional configuration properties. Returns the created queue object with assigned properties. The queue becomes immediately available for messaging after creation.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about required request body fields, what is returned, and side effects (queue availability). data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific queue

data.current_description: Updates properties of an existing queue
data.description_suggestion: Updates properties of an existing queue using the QueueUpdateRequest. Supports partial updates - only provided fields in the request will be modified. Returns the updated queue object. Changes take effect immediately without requiring queue manager restart.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about what properties can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, what is returned, and when changes take effect. Enhanced description clarifies input expectations, partial update support, return value, and operational side effects for improved AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteQueue' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks important preconditions (queue must be empty), required parameters, and critical side effects (permanent deletion, impact on subscriptions). Enhanced description specifies prerequisites, required parameters, and side effects to help AI agents understand constraints and consequences of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Deletes a queue from the queue manager
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a queue from the specified queue manager. The queue must be empty before deletion. Requires qmgrName and queueName path parameters. Deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. Any subscriptions or references to this queue will be invalidated.
data.reasoning: Description lacks important preconditions (queue must be empty), required parameters, and critical side effects (permanent deletion, impact on subscriptions). Enhanced description specifies prerequisites, required parameters, and side effects to help AI agents understand constraints and consequences of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Returns a list of channels for a specific queue manager

Returns a ChannelListResponse containing an array of Channel objects with properties including name, type, and status. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters.

data.current_description: Returns a list of subscriptions for a specific queue manager

Returns a SubscriptionListResponse containing an array of Subscription objects with properties including name, topic, and destination queue. Useful for discovering topic-based messaging subscriptions.

message: Operation 'browseMessages' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain parameter requirements, response structure, filtering capabilities, and use cases. Added details about non-destructive nature, response schema, and pagination support for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Browses messages on the specified queue without removing them
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves and displays messages from the specified queue without removing them (non-destructive read). Requires queue manager name and queue name as path parameters. Returns a MessageListResponse containing an array of Message objects with full message content and metadata. Supports filtering by message properties and pagination through query parameters. Useful for inspecting queue contents without consuming messages.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain parameter requirements, response structure, filtering capabilities, and use cases. Added details about non-destructive nature, response schema, and pagination support for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'consumeMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to clarify parameter requirements, response structure, and importantly, the side effect of permanent message removal. Added explicit state change information and filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding of consequences.

data.current_summary: Consume a message from a queue
data.current_description: Destructively gets (consumes) a message from the specified queue
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves and removes a message from the specified queue (destructive read). Requires queue manager name and queue name as path parameters. Returns a Message object containing the message content and metadata. The message is permanently removed from the queue after retrieval. Supports filtering by message properties through query parameters. This operation modifies queue state by removing the message.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to clarify parameter requirements, response structure, and importantly, the side effect of permanent message removal. Added explicit state change information and filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding of consequences.

message: Operation 'login' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain input requirements (LoginRequest schema), token usage instructions, token lifecycle, and authentication requirements for other operations. Added specificity about how to use the returned token and its validity period for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Authenticates a user and returns a LTPA token for subsequent API calls
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user with provided credentials and returns an LTPA token for use in subsequent API requests. Accepts a LoginRequest containing username and password. Returns an authentication token that should be included in the 'Authorization' header or as a cookie for authenticated operations. The token remains valid until explicitly invalidated via the logout endpoint. Required for accessing protected API resources.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain input requirements (LoginRequest schema), token usage instructions, token lifecycle, and authentication requirements for other operations. Added specificity about how to use the returned token and its validity period for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'logout' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain authentication requirements, what happens after logout, response structure, and security context. Added details about token invalidation, authentication requirements, and security implications for better AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.

data.current_description: Invalidates the current LTPA token
data.description_suggestion: Invalidates the current LTPA authentication token, terminating the user's session. Requires an active LTPA token in the request (via Authorization header or cookie). After successful logout, the token cannot be used for subsequent API calls. Returns a success response with no body. This operation should be called when the user session is no longer needed to ensure security.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain authentication requirements, what happens after logout, response structure, and security context. Added details about token invalidation, authentication requirements, and security implications for better AI agent understanding of when and why to use this operation.
